claim_boundary.interpretation: The 260627 rule was created locally on 2026-06-17 before the 2026-06-22..2026-06-26 test dates. It is pending/not scored and cannot be used as validation until validation/test public SP3 products become valid gzip/SP3 products and the frozen rule is scored once.
